positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a cosmic sloth meditating on a crescent moon, surrounded by bioluminescent nebula dust and stylized constellations. The style is vibrant vaporwave kawaii meets sacred geometry, featuring clean, thick outlines and contrasting jewel tones (deep indigo, electric cyan, neon magenta, and ethereal gold). The composition is symmetrical and centralized, designed for a high-contrast, apparel-ready print, with negative space emphasizing the silhouette. The overall mood is tranquil, whimsical, and retro-futuristic. Flat graphic design, sticker style, highly detailed and crisp.
negative: blur, watermark, text, signature, artifact, messy, low resolution, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, noise, grainy, realistic photo, 3d render, oil painting, cinematic lighting
